Bandwidth.com CLEC, LLC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Bandwidth Inc. ©2026
Cookie Preference Center
Bandwidth and our partners use cookies, pixels, and similar tracking technology tools (“Cookies”) to gather information about you, your device, and how you interact with our website. Some Cookies are necessary for the website to function and are always enabled. Other Cookies are “optional,” including Cookies used to provide enhanced functionality and personalization, monitor the performance of our site, and evaluate and improve advertising. You can choose to disable some types of Cookies on your device by indicating your preferences to us below. Click on the category headings to find more information about our purposes for using each category of Cookies and use the toggles to change our default settings to reflect your preferences. Please note that disabling some types of Cookies may affect the functionality of and your experience on our websites.
Although we do not “sell” information collected via Cookies for money, we engage in routine online activities (such as targeted or cross-contextual behavioral advertising) with third parties in ways that could be considered a “sale” or “sharing” as defined under the California Consumer Privacy Act. You can opt out of such disclosures by disabling the “Targeting Cookies” toggle below by moving the white circle to the left so that it displays a gray bar and clicking “Confirm Selections” below.
For more information, see our
Privacy Notice
.
Accept all
Manage cookie preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These Cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are frequently only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services from you, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these Cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These Cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by these companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites from us and other parties. They generally do not collect identifying information such as name, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and device. [Please note that even if you opt out of Targeting Cookies you may still see our ads on other websites, applications, and online services, and we may still base aspects of our advertising on your interactions with us and our websites.]
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These Cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality, including detecting bots and maintaining security on the website. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these Cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These Cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. For example, they help us to know which pages and features are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these Cookies we may not be able to monitor and address performance issues on the website.
Cookies Details

hits.title: What: A terminal tool to check what is taking up your bandwidth
How I attacked myself using Google and I ramped up a $1000 bandwidth bill
Thank you for helping us increase our bandwidth
Why is Cloudflare Pages' bandwidth unlimited?
BYOMesh – New LoRa mesh radio offers 100x the bandwidth
Comparing Bandwidth Costs of Amazon, Google and Microsoft Cloud Computing
The Relative Cost of Bandwidth Around the World
UK ISP Sky feeds realtime customer bandwidth data to litigous anti-piracy firm

analysis.name: Bandwidth
analysis.value_proposition: Direct-to-carrier communications APIs and enterprise integrations for voice, messaging, and emergency services at global scale.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large enterprises, SaaS communication platforms, Voice AI startups, and communications providers needing direct-to-carrier reliability at scale

features.name: voice api
features.description: Programmable voice calling with 6-second billing increments on an all-IP network
features.evidence_quote: Embed flexible, scalable voice calling into your application with 6-second billing increments

features.name: sms messaging api
features.description: Outbound and inbound SMS for 10DLC, short code, toll-free, and alphanumeric senders
features.evidence_quote: Our messaging APIs let you build 10DLC, Short Code, Toll-free, Alphanumeric, and Global Mobile Number texting

features.name: mms messaging api
features.description: Multimedia messaging (MMS) for 10DLC, short code, and toll-free number types
features.evidence_quote: MMS outbound — U.S. 10DLC $0.015 per message, U.S. Short code $0.020 per message

features.name: rcs messaging
features.description: Rich Communication Services messaging to enrich communications beyond SMS
features.evidence_quote: Get global SMS with higher throughput and deeper deliverability insights, and enrich your communications with RCS.

features.name: emergency calling api
features.description: Programmable emergency (911) calling compliance and routing for applications

features.name: webrtc api
features.description: Browser and mobile in-app voice/video calling via WebRTC

features.name: authentication api
features.description: Multi-factor authentication (2FA) via phone call or SMS for user account security
features.evidence_quote: Secure your software, website, or application user accounts with multi-factor authentication.

features.name: call verification
features.description: Carrier-level call verification to authenticate inbound calls and reduce fraud

features.name: media streaming (unidirectional)
features.description: One-way real-time audio streaming from active calls to external services

features.name: media streaming (bidirectional)
features.description: Two-way real-time audio streaming enabling conversational AI and voice bots

features.name: in-app calling
features.description: Embedded voice calling within mobile or web applications

features.name: global sip trunking
features.description: All-IP SIP trunking with reduced latency and 24/7 network monitoring across 65+ countries
features.evidence_quote: Consolidate and save with all-IP, flexible SIP trunking services with reduced latency and 24/7 network monitoring.

features.name: voip origination
features.description: Inbound VoIP call origination for premises-based or cloud telecom infrastructure

features.name: voip termination
features.description: Outbound VoIP call termination for premises-based or cloud telecom infrastructure

features.name: global emergency calling
features.description: Emergency calling compliance services for global deployments

features.name: nomadic emergency services
features.description: E911 compliance for nomadic/remote workers whose location changes dynamically

features.name: international long distance
features.description: International voice termination and long-distance calling services

features.name: toll-free voice
features.description: Toll-free number provisioning and inbound/outbound toll-free calling

features.name: voice and messaging insights
features.description: Analytics and observability platform for voice call and message delivery performance

features.name: campaign registration
features.description: 10DLC campaign registration management for compliant A2P messaging

features.name: phone number management
features.description: Search, provision, and manage local, toll-free, and short code phone numbers

features.name: number porting
features.description: Port existing phone numbers in and out of the Bandwidth network

features.name: caller id management
features.description: Configure and manage outbound caller ID presentation

features.name: number reputation management
features.description: Monitor and remediate phone number spam/scam reputation scores

features.name: contact center security & trust
features.description: Suite of security and trust tools for contact center voice traffic integrity

features.name: text-to-speech (standard)
features.description: Standard quality TTS for automated voice applications

features.name: text-to-speech (enhanced)
features.description: Higher-quality neural TTS for voice applications requiring natural-sounding speech

features.name: call transcription (standard)
features.description: Post-call audio transcription to text

features.name: call transcription (real-time)
features.description: Live in-call transcription streamed as the call progresses

features.name: call recording
features.description: Record voice calls for compliance, quality, or analytics purposes

features.name: audio conferencing
features.description: Multi-party audio conferencing bridges for calls

features.name: answering machine detection
features.description: Detect whether a call was answered by a human or voicemail/answering machine

features.name: microsoft teams direct routing
features.description: BYOC integration connecting Bandwidth PSTN directly to Microsoft Teams via Direct Routing

features.name: microsoft teams operator connect
features.description: Certified Operator Connect integration for managed PSTN service in Microsoft Teams

features.name: genesys cloud cx integration
features.description: Direct-to-carrier BYOC integration with Genesys Cloud CX contact center platform

features.name: webex calling integration
features.description: Direct-to-carrier PSTN integration with Cisco Webex Calling UCaaS platform

features.name: zoom phone integration
features.description: BYOC PSTN integration with Zoom Phone for enterprise calling

features.name: google voice sip link
features.description: SIP Link integration connecting Bandwidth trunking to Google Voice for Workspace

features.name: five9 integration
features.description: Direct-to-carrier BYOC integration with Five9 cloud contact center platform

features.name: pindrop voice authentication
features.description: Integration with Pindrop for call center voice authentication and fraud detection

features.name: conversational ai connectivity
features.description: Direct connectivity layer linking CCaaS platforms to conversational AI engines
features.evidence_quote: Conversational AI with easy connectivity into your CCaaS

features.name: bring your own ai (byoai)
features.description: Connect any third-party AI engine to Bandwidth's carrier network for voice AI applications

features.name: bandwidth maestro
features.description: Orchestration platform composing carrier integrations and call flows across UCaaS/CCaaS/AI vendors
features.evidence_quote: Take command of your communications with Bandwidth Maestro™, the carrier with the most direct-to-carrier integrations worldwide.

features.name: wholesale voice activation agent
features.description: Wholesale voice product for communications providers to activate voice services at scale

features.name: 10dlc messaging support
features.description: A2P 10-digit long code messaging with full campaign registration compliance

features.name: short code messaging
features.description: 5- and 6-digit short code SMS/MMS for high-volume A2P campaigns

features.name: alphanumeric sender id
features.description: Send SMS from a branded alphanumeric string instead of a phone number
features.evidence_quote: Alphanumeric, and Global Mobile Number texting into products and applications.

features.name: sdks (multi-language)
features.description: Official SDKs for multiple programming languages to simplify API integration
features.evidence_quote: We offer SDKs for several popular languages. Build your apps using our official SDKs in the language of your choice.

features.name: network status monitoring
features.description: Real-time public network status page for uptime and incident visibility

features.name: compliance hub
features.description: Centralized compliance documentation and regulatory guidance for telecom regulations

features.name: volume-based committed use discounts
features.description: High-volume pricing discounts for committed usage commitments

differentiators: Direct-to-carrier model — owns and operates its own network, no intermediary markup
Bandwidth Maestro: most direct-to-carrier integrations worldwide across UCaaS, CCaaS, and AI
93% of global economy covered with 65+ countries PSTN connectivity
>99% SLA response rate on all support tickets
Certified for both Microsoft Teams Direct Routing and Operator Connect

praised: Outage call time significantly decreased (Joe DeLuca, Wyndham): 'The amount of time we have spent on outage calls has significantly decreased'
Consistent call quality across contact center and PBX (Pennymac): 'we can rely on Bandwidth to deliver those calls at a high quality'
Ease of partnership for messaging operations (Attentive): 'Any partner to us that can make it easier for us to do what we do best'

tiers.name: SMS (Short Code outbound)
tiers.headline_inclusions: $0.008/msg outbound SMS on short code numbers

tiers.name: MMS (Short Code / Toll-Free outbound)
tiers.headline_inclusions: $0.020/msg outbound MMS on short code or toll-free

tiers.name: SIP Trunking
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom quote; usage-based for voice, emergency, and phone numbers

tiers.name: BYOC / Enterprise Integrations
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom pricing; covers Teams, Webex, Zoom, Genesys, Five9, Google Voice, AI platforms

pricing.notes: Fully usage-based/volume pricing model — no seat fees or flat monthly tiers for API products. All rates exclude taxes and fees. Volume committed-use discounts available. SIP trunking and enterprise integrations require custom quotes. Trial access available on request.
